extract: Trick Room redirects here. For the Festival Plaza facility, see Festival Plaza → Haunted houses. Trick Room (Japanese: トリックルーム Trick Room) is a non-damaging Psychic-type move introduced in Generation IV. It is: TM92 from Generation IV to Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon, and in Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl. TM70 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. TM161 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet.
